spells.coaching_note: The overloaded forge pulses a Frost-damage-taken debuff that stacks every 0.5s for 14s — line-of-sight it behind a Saronite Ore chunk to block it completely. The stacks make follow-up Frost damage lethal, so never eat it.
spells.name: Glacial Overload

spells.coaching_note: Targeted (likely the tank); leaves a 10yd avoidable ground pool — everyone else move out.
spells.name: Scourgelord's Reckoning

spells.coaching_note: Channeled Curse-root + snare on 2–3 players — decurse or Blessing of Freedom to break it.
spells.name: Shadowbind
